title: Moderation Actions — 2026-04-20
body:
The moderation team has completed a review of the abuse queue. Here is a summary of actions taken today:

**Bans (2)**
- spam_wave_42 — Permanently banned for coordinated phishing: posted malicious links across 6 channels within 20 minutes.
- toxic_runner — Permanently banned for repeated targeted harassment of newcomers.

**Warnings (2)**
- bot_like_user_77 — Warned for suspicious automation behaviour (near-identical repeated replies in help channels). Further violations may result in a ban.
- new_member_17 — Warned for an off-topic post in #introductions. Please review the channel guidelines.

**Reports Dismissed (2)**
- report_003 (trusted_helper) — Arose from a moderation disagreement. No policy violation found; dismissed.
- report_006 (core_maintainer) — Identified as a coordinated false-positive brigade following a legitimate moderation decision. Dismissed.

Trusted members are never sanctioned on the basis of unverified mass reports. If you have concerns about a moderation decision, please use the official appeals process.

— The Moderation Team
